_doc: Witness for a 420-line (840-point antipodal kissing) configuration in R^12. Each entry describes one line through the origin by an integer representative g: W2 {a,b,sign} means g = e_a + sign*e_b (unit vector g/sqrt(2)); U {support,signs} means g_i = signs[k] for i = support[k], else 0 (unit vector g/sqrt(8), i.e. entries +-1/(2*sqrt(2))). No counts, scores, or claims are stored: scripts/verify_420.py recomputes everything.
